samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Update maven-compiler-plugin to use 'release' flag instead of 'source'/'target'.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.why_exists: The 'release' flag is the standard for cross-compilation in modern Java; while source/target might work, release ensures API compatibility with the target JDK.
The original FindBugs annotations artifact is deprecated and may not be available or compatible with modern build tools; SpotBugs is the successor.
Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not fully support Java 21 compilation features.
Older versions of Jib may not support building images for Java 21 applications or may have security vulnerabilities.
Older versions may not be compatible with current Kubernetes API versions or build environments.
Older versions may not be compatible with current OpenShift API versions or build environments.
Required for testing Spring Boot 3.x applications with JUnit 5 and other testing utilities.
JUnit Vintage is for running JUnit 4 tests; since the project migrated to JUnit 5, this exclusion prevents unnecessary dependencies and potential conflicts.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Update groupId and artifactId to reflect new project structure.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.why_exists: Reflects organizational changes in the project structure, not a technical requirement for Java 21.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Update parent POM to new project structure.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.why_exists: Reflects organizational changes in the project structure, not a technical requirement for Java 21.
Ensures consistent character encoding across different environments, a best practice but not strictly required for Java 21.
The groovy-eclipse-compiler is no longer needed or has been replaced by groovy-eclipse-batch in newer versions.

samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.general_idea: Fix indentation and formatting in pom.xml.
samples/SimpleSpringApp/pom.xml.why_exists: Improves readability and consistency, not a technical requirement for Java 21.
